allOf.x-error-message: production serve must not enable LIBREDASH_DEV_AUTH_BYPASS

allOf.description: OIDC settings are all-or-none in production.
allOf.x-error-message: production OIDC auth requires LIBREDASH_OIDC_ISSUER_URL, LIBREDASH_OIDC_CLIENT_ID, LIBREDASH_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET, and LIBREDASH_OIDC_CALLBACK_URL

allOf.description: Azure settings are all-or-none in production.
allOf.x-error-message: production Azure auth requires LIBREDASH_AZURE_CLIENT_ID, LIBREDASH_AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET, and LIBREDASH_AZURE_CALLBACK_URL

allOf.description: Production requires local, API-token-only, OIDC, or Azure authentication.
allOf.x-error-message: production serve requires OIDC auth env vars, Azure auth env vars, LIBREDASH_LOCAL_AUTH, or LIBREDASH_API_TOKEN_ONLY_AUTH

allOf.description: Production requires a CSRF key with at least 32 characters.
allOf.x-error-message: production serve requires LIBREDASH_CSRF_KEY with at least 32 characters

allOf.description: Production requires a metrics bearer token with at least 32 characters.
allOf.x-error-message: production metrics scraping requires LIBREDASH_METRICS_BEARER_TOKEN with at least 32 characters

allOf.description: Production requires an explicit allowed host or a browser-auth callback host.
allOf.x-error-message: production serve requires LIBREDASH_ALLOWED_HOSTS or an OIDC/Azure callback URL host

allOf.description: Production browser authentication requires secure cookies unless API-token-only mode is also enabled.
The production OIDC issuer must use HTTPS.
allOf.x-error-message: production serve requires LIBREDASH_OIDC_ISSUER_URL to be an https URL

allOf.description: The production OIDC callback must use HTTPS.
allOf.x-error-message: production serve requires LIBREDASH_OIDC_CALLBACK_URL to be an https URL

allOf.description: The OIDC provider identifier must be route-safe.
allOf.x-error-message: LIBREDASH_OIDC_PROVIDER_ID must be a route-safe slug containing only letters, numbers, dots, underscores, or dashes

allOf.description: The production Azure callback must use HTTPS.
allOf.x-error-message: production serve requires LIBREDASH_AZURE_CALLBACK_URL to be an https URL

allOf.description: A configured production SCIM token must contain at least 32 characters.
allOf.x-error-message: production SCIM provisioning requires LIBREDASH_SCIM_BEARER_TOKEN with at least 32 characters

allOf.description: Managed data uses a supported storage backend.
allOf.x-error-message: LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_BACKEND must be local or s3

allOf.description: Every managed-data backend requires a private local runtime and staging directory.
The S3 managed-data backend requires a bucket and region.
allOf.x-error-message: S3 managed-data storage requires LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_BUCKET and LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_REGION

allOf.description: Managed-data S3 credentials are either omitted or configured as a complete key pair.
allOf.x-error-message: managed-data S3 credentials require both LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID and LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY; a session token also requires that pair

allOf.description: Managed-data upload, session, garbage-collection, and free-space limits are positive.
allOf.x-error-message: managed-data limits, durations, and free-space thresholds must be positive

allOf.description: The managed-data revision limit is at least the per-file limit.
allOf.x-error-message: LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_MAX_REVISION_BYTES must be at least LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_MAX_FILE_BYTES

LIBREDASH_AGENT_API_KEY.description: API key for the configured agent model provider.

LIBREDASH_ALLOWED_HOSTS.description: Comma- or whitespace-separated exact hosts and wildcard suffixes accepted in production.

LIBREDASH_API_TOKEN.description: API token used by non-interactive CLI commands.

LIBREDASH_API_TOKEN_ONLY_AUTH.description: Disable browser authentication and accept API tokens only.

LIBREDASH_ASSET_VERSION.description: Optional browser asset cache-busting version override.

LIBREDASH_AZURE_CALLBACK_URL.description: HTTPS callback URL registered with Azure AD or Entra ID.

LIBREDASH_AZURE_CLIENT_ID.description: Azure AD or Entra ID OAuth client identifier.

LIBREDASH_AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Azure AD or Entra ID OAuth client secret.

LIBREDASH_AZURE_TENANT.description: Optional Azure AD or Entra ID tenant identifier.

LIBREDASH_BASE_URL.description: Base URL used by browser QA tooling.

LIBREDASH_BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Email assigned to the production bootstrap administrator.

LIBREDASH_BOOTSTRAP_CACHE_DIR.description: Download cache directory used by dataset bootstrap tools.

LIBREDASH_BOOTSTRAP_FORCE.description: Force dataset bootstrap tools to refresh existing files.

LIBREDASH_CLI_CONFIG.description: Path to the local CLI target and token configuration file.

LIBREDASH_COOKIE_SECURE.description: Secure-cookie override; defaults to true for production browser authentication.

LIBREDASH_CSRF_KEY.description: Key used for CSRF protection and OAuth state cookies; production requires at least 32 characters.

LIBREDASH_DEV_API_TOKEN.description: Static bearer credential accepted by the public API in development; replace the development default on shared machines.

LIBREDASH_DEV_AUTH_BYPASS.description: Bypass authentication in development; forbidden in production.

LIBREDASH_DEV_LOG_LINES.description: Number of log lines shown by the managed development server.

LIBREDASH_DEV_PORT_COUNT.description: Number of ports scanned by the managed development server.

LIBREDASH_DEV_PORT_START.description: First port scanned by the managed development server.

LIBREDASH_DEV_PROJECT.description: Project published by the managed development server.

LIBREDASH_DEV_READY_ATTEMPTS.description: Readiness attempts made by the managed development server.

LIBREDASH_DEV_READY_INTERVAL.description: Delay between managed development server readiness attempts.

LIBREDASH_DEV_RESTART.description: Force the managed development server to restart.

LIBREDASH_DEV_SKIP_PUBLISH.description: Skip automatic project publishing in the managed development server.

LIBREDASH_DEV_WORKTREE.description: Worktree path exported by the managed development server.

LIBREDASH_DUCKDB_DIR.description: Directory containing workspace DuckDB runtime files.

LIBREDASH_DUCKLAKE_CATALOG_PATH.description: Path to the single global DuckLake catalog.

LIBREDASH_EXEC_JOB_LEASE_TIMEOUT.description: Lease duration before an abandoned refresh job may be reclaimed.

LIBREDASH_EXEC_MAX_QUEUED_READS.description: Maximum queued interactive read queries; negative disables queuing.

LIBREDASH_EXEC_MAX_QUEUED_WRITES.description: Maximum queued refresh jobs; negative disables queuing.

LIBREDASH_EXEC_MAX_RUNNING_READS.description: Maximum concurrently running interactive read queries.

LIBREDASH_EXEC_READ_QUEUE_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum time an interactive read may wait in the queue.

LIBREDASH_EXEC_READ_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum execution time for an interactive read query.

LIBREDASH_GID.description: Temporary container group identifier used during provisioning.

LIBREDASH_HEALTHCHECK_URL.description: Explicit readiness URL used by the healthcheck command.

LIBREDASH_HOME.description: Instance state directory containing databases, artifacts, and runtime files.

LIBREDASH_IMAGE.description: Immutable LibreDash OCI image reference consumed by deployment tooling.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_BACKEND.description: Storage backend for project-global managed data; supported values are local and s3.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_DIR.description: Private local root for managed-data objects, upload staging, and verified runtime views; S3 deployments use it as the runtime cache.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_GC_GRACE_PERIOD.description: Minimum age of unreferenced managed-data objects before garbage collection.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_MAX_FILES.description: Maximum number of files in one managed-data revision.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_MAX_FILE_BYTES.description: Maximum size in bytes of one managed-data file.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_MAX_REVISION_BYTE.description: Maximum total size in bytes of one managed-data revision.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_MIN_FREE_BYTES.description: Minimum free bytes required before accepting local managed-data uploads.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: Optional S3 access-key identifier for managed-data storage.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_BUCKET.description: S3 bucket used for managed-data objects and staging.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_PATH_STYLE.description: Use path-style addressing for S3-compatible managed-data storage.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_PREFIX.description: Object-key prefix for managed data in the configured S3 bucket.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_REGION.description: S3 region used for managed-data requests.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_.description: Optional S3 secret access key for managed-data storage.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_S3_SESSION_TOKEN.description: Optional temporary S3 session token for managed-data storage.

LIBREDASH_MANAGED_DATA_UPLOAD_SESSION_TT.description: Lifetime of an incomplete managed-data upload session.

LIBREDASH_METRICS_BEARER_TOKEN.description: Bearer token protecting the Prometheus metrics endpoint; production requires at least 32 characters.

LIBREDASH_OIDC_CALLBACK_URL.description: HTTPS callback URL registered with the generic OIDC provider.

LIBREDASH_OIDC_ISSUER_URL.description: HTTPS issuer URL for the generic OIDC provider.

LIBREDASH_OIDC_PROVIDER_ID.description: Route-safe identifier for the generic OIDC provider.

LIBREDASH_OIDC_SCOPES.description: Comma- or whitespace-separated additional OIDC scopes.

LIBREDASH_PERF_ENFORCE_THRESHOLDS.description: Fail dashboard performance QA when phase latency or query-count thresholds are exceeded.

LIBREDASH_PERF_ITERATIONS.description: Measured interaction iterations run by the configured dashboard performance scenario.

LIBREDASH_PERF_LOG.description: Development server log consumed by dashboard performance QA.

LIBREDASH_PERF_MAX_ALL_TARGET_P95_MS.description: Maximum all-target settlement p95 when performance thresholds are enforced.

LIBREDASH_PERF_MAX_CRITICAL_KPI_P95_MS.description: Maximum critical-KPI settlement p95 when performance thresholds are enforced.

LIBREDASH_PERF_MAX_FIRST_TARGET_PAINT_P9.description: Maximum first-target paint p95 when performance thresholds are enforced.

LIBREDASH_PERF_MAX_OPTIMISTIC_FEEDBACK_P.description: Maximum local optimistic-feedback p95 when performance thresholds are enforced.

LIBREDASH_PERF_MAX_QUERIES.description: Maximum physical queries per measured refresh when performance thresholds are enforced.

LIBREDASH_PERF_OUTPUT.description: Optional JSON output path; defaults to a suite-specific file under .tmp.

LIBREDASH_PERF_SCENARIO.description: Path to a dashboard performance scenario manifest.

LIBREDASH_PRODUCTION.description: Enable production serving and validation behavior.

LIBREDASH_QUACK_TOKEN.description: Credential injected into the Quack connection declaration.

LIBREDASH_QUERY_CACHE_MAX_BYTES.description: Maximum retained bytes for governed interactive query results per semantic model runtime.

LIBREDASH_QUERY_CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES.description: Maximum governed interactive query result entries retained per semantic model runtime.

LIBREDASH_SCIM_BEARER_TOKEN.description: Bearer token enabling SCIM provisioning; production requires at least 32 characters when set.

LIBREDASH_SMOKE_PORT.description: Host port used by the production image smoke test.

LIBREDASH_TOKEN_HASH_KEY.description: Optional dedicated key for deterministic API-token fingerprints; falls back to the CSRF key.

LIBREDASH_TRUST_PROXY_HEADERS.description: Trust client-address headers only when a trusted proxy overwrites them.

LIBREDASH_UID.description: Temporary container user identifier used during provisioning.

LIBREDASH_WAREHOUSE_DSN.description: Example externally supplied warehouse connection credential.
